findings.detail: Pure Python statistical computation. No LLM calls, no network I/O, no file I/O (logging only). All computation is deterministic.

detect_methodology_convergence() identifies when shadows with shared Phase I methodology lineage produce correlated outputs. Uses Jaccard similarity on ancestor sets. This is a safety feature — prevents methodology collusion from being mistaken for independent validation. Hardcoded thresholds (0.80 agreement, 5 days, 0.5 Jaccard).
_binomial_test() uses log-gamma formulation (math.lgamma) for combinatorial stability at large N. Returns two-tailed p-value for conservatism. No floating-point overflow risk.
10+ consecutive days of high agreement triggers ESCALATE_TO_INSTITUTIONAL_ANALYSIS — a human-in-the-loop safety valve. Logged at WARNING level for monitoring visibility.
CATFISH_CONSENSUS_THRESHOLD lowered from 0.80 to 0.60 with documented rationale: Phase I knowledge distillation may cause shadows to converge. Earlier intervention preserves ecosystem diversity.
